ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Unique name for each Super Bowl game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the Super Bowl game */,
  "super_bowl_number" INTEGER /* Super Bowl number (e.g., 52) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game was held */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "combined_points" INTEGER /* Combined points scored by both teams */,
  "difference_points" INTEGER /* Difference in points between the winning and losing teams */,
  "tv_viewership" INTEGER /* Number of TV viewers for the game */,
  "streaming_views" INTEGER /* Number of streaming views for the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity level during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the venue location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the venue */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue's location */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface the venue has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the team */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team's mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's career started */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's career ended */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coach's style of coaching */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "draft_pick" TEXT /* Draft pick information */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Rookie year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_winners" (
  "game_winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game winner entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the winning team */,
  "qb_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first quarterback of the winning team */,
  "qb_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second quarterback of the winning team (if applicable) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the winning team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the winning team */,
  "time_of_possession" INTEGER /* Total time of possession for the winning team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards for the winning team */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards for the winning team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_winners_qb_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("qb_id_1") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_winners_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_winners_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_winners_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_losers" (
  "game_loser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game loser entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the losing team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the losing team */,
  "qb_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first quarterback of the losing team */,
  "qb_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second quarterback of the losing team (if applicable) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the losing team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the losing team */,
  "time_of_possession" INTEGER /* Total time of possession for the losing team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards for the losing team */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards for the losing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_loser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_losers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_losers_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_losers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_losers_qb_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("qb_id_1") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mvp_awards" (
  "mvp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MVP award */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who won the MVP award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the MVP award was given */,
  "award_reason" TEXT /* Reason the player was awarded the MVP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mvp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mvp_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mvp_awards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's access to the game data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
